# antiscia

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/antiscia"
```

Package antiscia calculates antiscia and contra\-antiscia mirror points. Antiscia reflect a planet's longitude across the Cancer\-Capricorn axis, while contra\-antiscia reflect across the Aries\-Libra axis.

CalcChartAntiscia computes mirror points for all chart positions. FindAntisciaPairs detects planets in antiscia or contra\-antiscia aspect within a specified orb.

<a name="CalcAntiscia"></a>
## func [CalcAntiscia](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/antiscia/antiscia.go#L38>)

```go
func CalcAntiscia(lon float64) float64
```

CalcAntiscia computes the antiscion of an ecliptic longitude. The antiscion mirrors a point across the Cancer\-Capricorn axis \(solstice axis\). Formula: antiscion = 360° \- longitude \+ 180° = \(180° \- longitude\) mod 360 ... Actually: antiscion mirrors across the 0°Can/0°Cap axis. If longitude is X, the antiscion is at \(360° \- X\) reflected over the Cancer/Capricorn axis. Standard formula: antiscion\(lon\) = \(360° \- lon\) mod 360° ... no. Correct: The solstice axis runs from 0° Cancer \(90°\) to 0° Capricorn \(270°\). Mirror across this axis: antiscion = 180° \- lon \(normalized to \[0, 360\)\) This means: Aries ↔ Virgo, Taurus ↔ Leo, Gemini ↔ Cancer,

```
Libra ↔ Pisces, Scorpio ↔ Aquarius, Sagittarius ↔ Capricorn
```

<a name="CalcContraAntiscia"></a>
## func [CalcContraAntiscia](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/antiscia/antiscia.go#L45>)

```go
func CalcContraAntiscia(lon float64) float64
```

CalcContraAntiscia computes the contra\-antiscion \(mirror across equinox axis\). The equinox axis runs from 0° Aries \(0°\) to 0° Libra \(180°\). contra\_antiscion = 360° \- lon

<a name="AntisciaPair"></a>
## type [AntisciaPair](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/antiscia/antiscia.go#L21-L26>)

AntisciaPair represents two planets whose antiscia are conjunct

```go
type AntisciaPair struct {
    PlanetA models.PlanetID `json:"planet_a"`
    PlanetB models.PlanetID `json:"planet_b"`
    Type    string          `json:"type"` // "antiscia" or "contra_antiscia"
    Orb     float64         `json:"orb"`
}
```

<a name="FindAntisciaPairs"></a>
### func [FindAntisciaPairs](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/antiscia/antiscia.go#L71>)

```go
func FindAntisciaPairs(positions []models.PlanetPosition, orb float64) []AntisciaPair
```

FindAntisciaPairs finds planets whose antiscia or contra\-antiscia are conjunct to another planet \(within the given orb\)

<a name="AntisciaPoint"></a>
## type [AntisciaPoint](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/antiscia/antiscia.go#L9-L18>)

AntisciaPoint represents a planet's antiscion or contra\-antiscion

```go
type AntisciaPoint struct {
    PlanetID           models.PlanetID `json:"planet_id"`
    OriginalLon        float64         `json:"original_longitude"`
    AntisciaLon        float64         `json:"antiscia_longitude"`
    AntisciaSign       string          `json:"antiscia_sign"`
    AntiSciaDeg        float64         `json:"antiscia_sign_degree"`
    ContraAntisciaLon  float64         `json:"contra_antiscia_longitude"`
    ContraAntisciaSign string          `json:"contra_antiscia_sign"`
    ContraAntiSciaDeg  float64         `json:"contra_antiscia_sign_degree"`
}
```
